title: ocimum labiatum
intro: Ocimum labiatum, also known as Basil, is a sweet-smelling annual herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Ocimum labiatum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and providing antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. Ocimum labiatum is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
